title: Copper stuff (Tools & Armor)
description: Making copper useful by adding tools, armor and some op weapons
body:
Adds copper tools (sword, axe, pickaxe, shovel, hoe) and armor (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots). Includes 3 OP weapons (sword, axe, pickaxe).

The items can be searched in the creative menu, and have their own group, which is likely on the second page of the menu.

You can craft the items like any other tools and armor. But OP tools need materials that are harder to get.
